info.title: Advanced Notification Platform Integration API
info.description: Advanced Notification Platform Integration API provides API for products to send notification content for delivery of the notification via InApp, Push, SMS or Email.  The API also allows products to check for Notification delivery status and Notification history.

tags.name: Notification
tags.description: Operations to send notification and retrieve notification status

post.description: This API used to generate token.

get.description: This API used to get all product rules.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Identifier to get next set of data

parameters.name: tag
parameters.description: If tag passed then data will be filter based on tag

post.description: This API used to create a new product rule.

Location.description: Address of the product rule resource

get.description: This API used to get product rule.

put.description: This API used to update product rule using product rule code.

delete.description: This API used to delete product rule using product rule code.

post.description: This API used to send notification.

get.description: This API used to get notification log.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Identifier to get next set of data

get.description: This API used to get notification log using Job Id.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Identifier to get next set of data

get.description: This API used to get all SMS configurations.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Identifier to get next set of data

parameters.name: tag
parameters.description: If tag passed then data will be filter based on tag e.g. TenantID

post.description: This API used to create a new SMS configuration.

Location.description: Address of the SMS configuration resource

parameters.name: smsCode
parameters.description: Product SMS configuration code - unique identifier

get.description: This API used to get SMS configuration.

put.description: This API used to update SMS configuration using sms configuration code.

delete.description: This API used to delete SMS configuration using SMS configuration code.

get.description: This API used to get all email configurations.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Identifier to get next set of data

parameters.name: tag
parameters.description: If tag passed then data will be filter based on tag e.g. TenantID

post.description: This API used to create a new email configuration.

Location.description: Address of the email configuration resource

parameters.name: emailCode
parameters.description: Product email configuration code - unique identifier

get.description: This API used to get email configuration.

put.description: This API used to update email configuration using email configuration code.

delete.description: This API used to delete email configuration using email configuration code.

EmailType.description: Email type supported by Communication platform.  `Default` - Send email using notification platform aws pinpoint service. `Office365ExchangeOnline` - Send email using Office365 credentials. `Office365SMTP` - Send email using Office365SMTP credentials. `Exchange` - Send email using Microsoft exchange server credentials. `SMTP` - Send email using SMTP server credentials.

tag.description: Tag to filter email configuration based on tenant e.g. SchoolId.

clientID.description: Azure AD application clientId, required on hasMFA is true.

tenantID.description: Azure AD application tenantID, required on hasMFA is true.

clientSecret.description: Azure AD application client secret, required on hasMFA is true.

createdDate.description: Email configuration created date in ISO8601 format.

updatedDate.description: Email configuration last updated date in ISO8601 format.

createdDate.description: Email configuration created date in ISO8601 format.

updatedDate.description: Email configuration last updated date in ISO8601 format.

createdDate.description: Email configuration created date in ISO8601 format.

updatedDate.description: Email configuration last updated date in ISO8601 format.

createdDate.description: Email configuration created date in ISO8601 format.

updatedDate.description: Email configuration last updated date in ISO8601 format.

clientID.description: Azure AD application clientId, required on hasMFA is true.

tenantID.description: Azure AD application tenantID, required on hasMFA is true.

createdDate.description: Email configuration created date in ISO8601 format.

updatedDate.description: Email configuration last updated date in ISO8601 format.

data.description: Return list of product email configurations.

nextCursor.description: Next cursor to fetch next set of data. Pass nextCursor as cursor query string.

previousCursor.description: Previous cursor to fetch previous set of data. Pass previousCursor as cursor query string.

tag.description: Tag to filter SMS configuration based on tenant e.g. SchoolId.

createdDate.description: SMS configuration created date in ISO8601 format.

updatedDate.description: SMS configuration last updated date in ISO8601 format.

createdDate.description: SMS configuration created date in ISO8601 format.

updatedDate.description: SMS configuration last updated date in ISO8601 format.

messageId.description: message Id, unique for each message

token.description: Generated JWT token, It can be used to send notification, connect to InApp for receive notification.

nextCursor.description: Next cursor to fetch next set of data. Pass nextCursor as cursor query string.

previousCursor.description: Previous cursor to fetch previous set of data. Pass previousCursor as cursor query string.

rules.name: InApp Notification
rules.pushDefaultMessage: Notification is available. Please tap to get more information.

actionType.description: action type, Pass when InApp/Push notification configured

pushNotificationSubject.description: Pass if Push notification is selected in rule
pushNotificationSubject.example: Notification is available. Please tap to get more information.

emailSubject.description: Pass if Email notification is selected in rule

isEmailHTMLFormat.description: Pass true for html format message other wise false

fallback.description: Pass true to send sms using notification platform environment when provided sms configuration should not work.
Pass true to send email using notification platform environment when provided email configuration should not work.

username.description: username/email to create send email credentials.

password.description: Password to create send email credentials.

userIdentifier.description: User identifier - Products user identifier, should be unique per User

retryAttemptSeconds.description: Retry attempt in Seconds, require when InApp notification is selected and retryAttempt is defined.

retryAttempt.description: Retry attempt, require when InApp notification is selected.

pushDefaultMessage.description: When Push notification will be used to send notification, default message will be delivered in mobile application.
pushDefaultMessage.example: Notification is available. Please tap to get more information.

emailDefaultSubject.description: When InApp and Email notification will be used to send notification, default subject will be delivered for email notification if message not delivers via InApp notification

tag.description: rule tag to filter rules based on tag

createdDate.description: Rule created date in ISO8601 format

updatedDate.description: Rule last updated date in ISO8601 format

pushDefaultMessage.description: When Push notification will be used to send notification, default message will be delivered in mobile application
pushDefaultMessage.example: Notification is available. Please tap to get more information.

retryAttemptSeconds.description: Retry attempt in Seconds, require when InApp notification is selected and retryAttempt is defined.

retryAttempt.description: Retry attempt, require when InApp notification is selected.

emailDefaultSubject.description: When InApp and Email notification will be used to send notification, default subject will be delivered for email notification if message not delivers via InApp notification

tag.description: rule tag to filter rules based on tag

SmsType.description: SMS type supported by Communication platform.  `URL` - Send SMS using provided URL and user credentials. `Default` - Send SMS using notification platform aws pinpoint service.

data.description: Return list of product SMS configurations.

nextCursor.description: Next cursor to fetch next set of data. Pass nextCursor as cursor query string.

previousCursor.description: Previous cursor to fetch previous set of data. Pass previousCursor as cursor query string.

isSuccess.description: true/false, true if notification sent using notification type

log.description: if isSuccess is false then log will help to understand why notification not sent

itemIndex.description: item Index, if multiple items has been passed, item index gives reference item number

date.description: date/time when notification sent in ISO8601 format

uid.description: User identifier - user identifier should be unique for each user

items.description: Phone number - phone number in E.164 format
Email address - email address of user

NotificationType.description: Notification type supported by Communication platform. `InApp`- For InApp communication, `SMS` - SMS Communication, `Email` - Email Communication,  `Push` - Mobile Push communication, , `None` - None

dt.description: Device token - User mobile device token

da.description: Device application - Push configuration code configured in product

nextStartDate.description: next start date, Pass as cursor to fetch data next time

nextCursor.description: Next cursor to fetch next set of data. Pass nextCursor as cursor query string.

previousCursor.description: Previous cursor to fetch previous set of data. Pass previousCursor as cursor query string.

nextCursor.description: Next cursor to fetch next set of data. Pass nextCursor as cursor query string.

previousCursor.description: Previous cursor to fetch previous set of data. Pass previousCursor as cursor query string.

updatedDate.description: Last updated date in ISO format

error.description: Error in processing, receiver will be empty so message is not processed.

PushServiceType.description: Mobile application supported configuration `FCM` - Android push configuration, `APNS` - IOS configuration

NotificationStatus.description: Notification status of receiver `NotInitiated` - Not Initiated, `InProcess` - In process, `Success` - Success, `Failed` - Failed,

RuleFetchType.description: Fetch Type `All` - All, `OutOfBox` - Out Of Box rules , `SpecificTag` - Rules based on specific tag, `SpecificTagWithOutOfBox` -Rules based on specific tag + Out Of Box rules
